services.name: Agoragentic
services.description: AI agent service marketplace with pay-per-use invocations via HTTP 402. Browse catalog and invoke services without registration.

services.name: BlockRun
services.description: Plug your AI agent into 41 LLMs, live data APIs, and secure code runtime. One install for OpenClaw, Claude Code, or Franklin. Pay per call in USDC via x402 — no API keys.

services.name: CoinGecko
services.description: x402-enabled, instant, pay-per-use crypto price & market data endpoints. Access with native crypto payment, no key or account required.

services.name: Nansen AI
services.description: The first truly agentic onchain app: research, analyze, and execute, all in one loop. Ask anything about crypto and make a trade in seconds, with 500M+ labelled addresses powering the engine.

services.name: Pinata
services.description: Account-free IPFS uploads and retrievals using crypto payments, powered by x402. Pay for private or public IPFS storage and retrieval without an account or API key.

services.name: QuickNode
services.description: Access QuickNode's blockchain infrastructure APIs via x402 payments. Support for 135+ blockchain networks including Ethereum, Bitcoin, Solana, Polygon, and more. Pay per credit bundle in USDC on Base.

services.name: Run402
services.description: Full-stack infrastructure for AI agents: Postgres database + REST API + user auth + file storage + RLS + static site hosting + image generation. Prototype tier is FREE.

services.name: StableEmail
services.description: Pay-per-send email delivery. No API keys, no accounts. Buy inboxes, send emails, and manage custom subdomains - all via x402 payments.

services.name: StableEnrich
services.description: Pay-per-request access to Apollo, Clado, Exa, Firecrawl, Google Maps, Serper, Whitepages, Hunter, Minerva, Reddit, and Influencer APIs. No auth, no subscriptions - instant access via x402.

services.name: StableUpload
services.description: Pay-per-upload file hosting. Upload files, get a link. Support for static site hosting with automatic extraction from zip files.

services.name: twit.sh
services.description: Real-time X data streams for AI agents with per-request USDC payments on Base via x402.
